context: Tests whether the agent follows Tessl naming conventions (kebab-case for all elements) and generates the correct tile directory structure with tiles/<domain>/<name>/ layout, including proper scenario folder naming.

checklist.name: Tile directory is kebab-case
checklist.description: The tile root directory name (the name of the tile folder created) uses only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens

checklist.name: Domain directory is kebab-case
checklist.description: The domain directory name (e.g. 'backend', 'devops') uses only lowercase letters and hyphens — no spaces or underscores

checklist.name: Skill name is kebab-case
checklist.description: The SKILL.md frontmatter 'name' field uses kebab-case format (lowercase, hyphens only)

checklist.name: Scenario folder names are kebab-case
checklist.description: All eval scenario subfolder names under evals/ use kebab-case format (e.g. 'basic-usage', 'error-handling')

checklist.name: No underscores in directory names
checklist.description: None of the tile, domain, skill, or scenario directory/file names use underscores (snake_case) — kebab-case only

checklist.name: Domain correctly chosen
checklist.description: The domain directory corresponds to a recognized domain category (e.g. backend, devops, security, frontend, qa)

checklist.name: Correct directory hierarchy
checklist.description: The tile is placed inside a path that follows tiles/<domain>/<tile-name>/ structure (at least two levels of hierarchy: domain then tile name)

checklist.name: tile.json name matches folder name
checklist.description: The slug in the tile.json name field (after 'steio-skills/') matches the tile directory name

checklist.name: No uppercase in names
checklist.description: Tile directory, skill name, scenario folder, and domain directory names do not contain uppercase letters

checklist.name: AGENTS.md generated
checklist.description: The tile includes an AGENTS.md file (not empty) alongside tile.json and SKILL.md
